brand.name: Baba Tour Umroh & Haji Khusus
brand.address: Ruko Mega Legenda 2 Blok B2 No 26, Batam

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border/50. Must be sticky at top.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-border text-primary hover:bg-surface transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium

components.cards: bg-surface border border-border/50 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
components.forms: Use Shadcn UI (Input, Textarea, Button). Labels must be visible. Add data-testid to all inputs and submit.

sections.name: Header
sections.guidelines: Logo left, Nav links center (desktop), CTA (WhatsApp) right. Hide nav behind hamburger on mobile.

sections.name: Hero
sections.guidelines: Full-bleed or large rounded inset image of Kaaba. Overline: 'Biro Perjalanan Umroh Terdaftar Resmi'. H1: Brand Name. Tagline below. 2 CTAs: 'Daftar Sekarang' (Primary) and 'Konsultasi' (Outline). Use image overlay bg-black/30.

sections.name: About
sections.guidelines: 2-column layout. Left: Staggered elegant images. Right: Text explaining the mission and SK Kemenag registration. Subtle trust logos (Kemenag, ASITA) below in a muted, slow marquee or grid.

sections.name: Packages
sections.guidelines: Display Umrah & Hajj packages. Use large, spacious cards. Include price (e.g., 'Mulai Rp 25.000.000'), duration, hotel rating, and 'Termasuk' (Inclusions) checklist.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.guidelines: Bento Grid (Control Room style or Tetris grid). 8 points: Trusted, Best Mentors, Quality Hotels, Official, On-time, Comfort, Professional, Exclusive. Use lucide-react icons. Minimal text, high visual impact.

sections.name: Gallery
sections.guidelines: Masonry grid of pilgrim moments. Slight hover zoom on images.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.guidelines: Horizontal scroll or 3-column grid. Serene design. Quote icon in accent color. Include pilgrim name and package.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.guidelines: Shadcn Accordion. Center-aligned section header. Max-w-3xl for the accordion container for readability.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.guidelines: Split section: Left side contact details (address, phone, email) with earthy background card. Right side functional inquiry form (FastAPI + MongoDB). Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Package Interest, Message. Submit button 'Kirim Pesan'.

sections.name: Footer
sections.guidelines: Dark background (bg-primary, text-white/80). Big typography for 'Baba Tour'. Columns for Links, Contact, and Socials. Massive padding py-20.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, representing role (e.g., hero-daftar-button, contact-submit-button, nav-about-link).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the defined fonts: Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body. Include them from Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use raw Shadcn Card components for marketing sections. Use custom div structures with Tailwind classes defined in layout_and_spacing for bento grids.
Form must be fully functional. The backend should be FastAPI exposing a POST endpoint for inquiries, saving data to MongoDB.
Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis is recommended, or scroll-behavior: smooth).
Include a fixed Floating WhatsApp button at bottom right (z-50) linking to wa.me with the provided number.
Ensure the hero background uses the media.hero_background.url with a max overlay of bg-black/30 so the image remains breathtakingly clear.
